texto: Guy welcomed my breasts warmly. He hugged them like long-lost friends and stared at them with the protectiveness of a mother lion, as if to make sure they didn't decide to get up on their own and leave the two of us alone together in his office. He waved them into a chair and asked if they would like anything to drink. On their behalf, I ordered Perrier.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ally O'Brien: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “Guy welcomed my breasts warmly. He hugged them like long-lost friends and stared at them with the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, chauvinism, sexism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e termino.
